meta.title: Columbia-Class : The most devastating submarines ever put to sea
meta.description:
The new Columbia-class of ballistic missile submarines, or boomers, are said to be the largest and stealthiest American submarines ever put to sea. And once they're in service, they'll carry enough nuclear firepower to end the world... or, preferably... to save it.
